journalName: RESEARCH ON LANGUAGE AND SOCIAL INTERACTION
raw_title: Unwrapping the gift of life: Newborn gender announcements as an interactional achievement
title_en: Unwrapping the gift of life: Newborn gender announcements as an interactional achievement
title_zh: 揭开生命礼物：新生儿性别宣布作为一种互动成就
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了人们如何通过互动来宣布新生儿的性别，将其视为一种社会成就。它关注宣布过程中的沟通方式及其在社会互动中的意义。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how people announce the gender of newborns through interaction, treating it as a social achievement. It focuses on the communication methods used in announcements and their significance in social interactions.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注社会互动中性别宣布的沟通实践，探索其在家庭和社会关系构建中的作用。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on communication practices in gender announcements within social interactions, exploring their role in constructing family and social relationships.
